edge_policy.description: Clusters are built from an evidence-protected reconstruction graph. Raw graph edges remain available for audit, but weak public-infrastructure or boundary edges do not merge accounts into one case cluster.
rules: Always keep edges that support a fired detector finding.
Keep low-degree non-account endpoints so mule UPI/cash-out destinations are not dropped.
Do not let high-degree public endpoints merge case clusters unless a fired detector already uses that edge.

cluster_summaries.summary: Two bank accounts, acct_001 and upi-flipkart-flipkart@ybl-642171014480-dr, are connected with a total of 631 transactions. The accounts show a pattern of first contact large transfer, with one transaction of 140633.04 on January 7, 2026, from upi-flipkart-flipkart@ybl-642171014480-dr to acct_001, and another transaction of 240.21 on the same day from acct_001 to upi-flipkart-flipkart@ybl-642171014480-dr. The evidence groups indicate a confidence tier of 3 for this pattern. The total score for the cluster is 0.0.
